top_signals.title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
top_signals.summary: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: People in China are watching the World Cup differently this time
top_signals.summary: A 12-hour-plus time difference and various streaming options are influencing how people in China watch the World Cup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
